mapper.insert: INSERT INTO yy_field_mapping_rule (platform_id, api_code, standard_field, source_paths, transform_type, transform_config, value_map, is_required, default_value, validation, sort_order, is_enabled) VALUES (#{platformId}, #{apiCode}, #{standardField}, #{sourcePaths}, #{transformType}, #{transformConfig}, #{valueMap}, #{isRequired}, #{defaultValue}, #{validation}, #{sortOrder}, #{isEnabled})

INSERT INTO yy_field_mapping_rule (platform_id, api_code, standard_field, source_paths, transform_type, transform_config, value_map, is_required, default_value, validation, sort_order, is_enabled) VALUES
(#{item.platformId}, #{item.apiCode}, #{item.standardField}, #{item.sourcePaths}, #{item.transformType}, #{item.transformConfig}, #{item.valueMap}, #{item.isRequired}, #{item.defaultValue}, #{item.validation}, #{item.sortOrder}, #{item.isEnabled})
